prereqs.description:
methylong samplesheet — one row per sample.
- group: sample group name (string; multiple samples can share a group). If not specified by user, auto-generate as 'group1', 'group2'...
- sample: sample name. If not specified, use the input filename without extension as sample name (e.g. 'PAU05248_pass_ffa693eb' from 'PAU05248_pass_ffa693eb.bam')
- path: FULL absolute path to the BAM/pod5 file
- ref: FULL absolute path to the reference genome FASTA
- method: sequencing platform — 'pacbio' or 'ont'

Each row in the rnaseq sample sheet represents a sample.
- sample: Sample name
- fastq_1: Path to Read1 fastq file (filename, excluding directory)
- fastq_2: Path to Read2 fastq file (gap-filling string for single-end sequencing)
- strandedness: Strandedness, auto / forward / reverse / unstranded
